prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document predominantly outlines fire safety strategies and interventions implemented by local councils and housing providers in England. It does not provide specific guidance or regulations applicable to Scotland, where fire safety policies are governed by different legislation and standards.
